description_long: This is a heavy-duty sledge axe featuring a robust, rectangular black metal head and a long, slightly curved wooden handle. The head is thick and blocky, with a flat striking face and a squared poll, designed for delivering powerful blows. The handle is made of light-colored wood, displaying visible grain patterns and a gentle ergonomic curve for improved grip and control. The transition between the handle and the head is seamless, with the wood securely fitted into the metal. The overall design is utilitarian, prioritizing durability and function over decorative elements. This tool is suitable for demanding tasks such as splitting logs or breaking hard materials in urban maintenance or construction settings.
description: A sturdy sledge axe with a black rectangular metal head and a long, curved wooden handle, designed for heavy-duty striking tasks.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the full length of the wooden handle and the flat face of the black metal head.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the length and slight curvature of the handle, as well as the thickness of the axe head.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the poll of the axe head and the end of the handle, with the head's width visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the handle's curve and the rectangular geometry of the head.
attribute_handle_type: Long, slightly curved wooden handle with visible grain, oval cross-section, ergonomic for gripping.
attribute_blade_design: Rectangular, blocky steel head with a flat striking face and squared poll; no beard or decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the wooden handle fitted and secured into the steel head.
